name: claude-starter
description: Team Claude Code starter: shared coding-standard skills, common-task workflows, and a curated plugin setup.

plugins.name: standards
plugins.description: Coding-standard skills (general + Python, TypeScript/React, CSS, SQL) plus the team docs-path convention. Auto-load by language.

plugins.name: workflows
plugins.description: Common-task helpers: /commit (team commit-message format), git-pr-prepare, and github-pr-review.

plugins.name: superpowers-team
plugins.description: Opt-in vendored fork of superpowers with the team docs-path convention baked in. Enable instead of stock superpowers, never both.

plugins.name: sdlc
plugins.description: Repo SDLC bootstrapping: the scaffolding-sdlc skill wires lint/test/e2e/security gates, Dependabot, PR-status labels, pre-commit + commit-doc hooks, and Claude PR automation onto a repo.
